title: 'Eshkol #0812
definition:
Eshcol = "cluster"

 1) an area of Hebron, the valley of Eshcol
 2) an Amorite, the brother of Mamre, dwelling in Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eshcol = "cluster"

 1) an area of Hebron, the valley of Eshcol
 2) an Amorite, the brother of Mamre, dwelling in Hebron

    NASB:  an Amorite, also a region of Hebron
